title: The Cat's Delight
description: A small add-on for Farmer's Delight, focusing on more fantasy and magical dishes, as well as holding its own unique content.
body:
Hey, you! Tired of the same ol' dishes? Don't got enough otherworldly magic or anything in your meals? Wanna grow some wacky fantasy ingredients!? Boy oh boy, you're in the RIGHT place my friend!

# New Ingredients!
- Arcane Seeds: The key ingredient not for cooking, but for obtaining new plants for said recipes. Made using wheat seeds as a base, magic from a piece of lapis, and enriched by the tear of a ghast!
- Chikara: Harvested from Chikara plants, a fruit with a savoury skin and sweet inside.
- Boombud Spice: A spice obtained via cutting a dangerous boombud, it's spicy and a tiny bit bitter, but it goes great for seasoning!
- Florabuzz: A plant that can be diced into spice, or have the petals used for a jolt awake in the morning, much healthier than coffee, too!
- And More!

# New Alloys!
Using the new Botany Alloy Forger, multiple unique alloys can be crafted! Some of which act as replacements for existing alloys such as steel or brass, whilst others are unique for this mod- but also have been given their own tags for others to use in their own mods!
- Organasteel
- Florabrass
- Chlorophyte
- Danketsu

# New Dishes!
Obviously, being an addon for Farmer's delight, a few new dishes have been added! And with every update, more and more will be added! Some are just yummy, others have some unique properties!

Hope you have fun! :>
